title: First Investment
goalDescription: Building up an initial amount before making your first investment, so you start from a position of readiness rather than urgency.
resultIntro: Here's a starting point for building your first investment amount, based on what you entered.

questions.label: Amount you'd like to start investing with
Amount already set aside for this
Expected annual return while you build this up (%)
questions.help: This is the return on your savings while you build toward your starting amount — not the return on the investment itself.
